slots: Jyotirlinga shrine, sacred architecture, spiritual heritage
Begin your journey at one of the twelve Jyotirlingas of Lord Shiva. Surrounded by the Brahmagiri Hills, this revered temple is a cornerstone of Nashik's spiritual identity.
Brahmagiri Hills & Origin of the Godavari
Pilgrimage trail, scenic views, sacred source
Explore the hills believed to be the birthplace of the Godavari River and experience the blend of natural beauty and religious significance.
Holy ghats, Ramayana connection, evening prayers
Walk through the sacred heart of Nashik, where legends from the Ramayana come alive amidst ancient temples and riverside rituals.
